title: Optimize Rust load path uses byte reads

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text:
Feature: Optimized load preserves correctness
  Scenario: Cold load reads all records after load-path change
    Given a data directory with JSON records for users, posts, and comments
    When I load the database from the schema
    Then the record counts match the fixture sizes
    And primary key lookups return the expected records

Notes:
- This story targets `Table::load_from_dir` optimizations (e.g., byte reads + preallocation).
- Performance evaluated via 10k `full_database_cold_load` yardstick.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Tried byte reads + preallocation in Rust load; no measurable improvement, so reverted. Story closed without implementation.
